# Composite Props

由基础组件组合出的业务型组件。 共 8 个组件。字段细节以 `packages/core/src/types/*.ts` 为准。

## ChatWindow

Source: `packages/core/src/types/composite.ts` · Interface: `ChatWindowProps`.

Showing 3 key props of 26; see source for the complete interface.

| Prop            | Type            | Default | Notes                              |
| --------------- | --------------- | ------- | ---------------------------------- |
| `messages?`     | `ChatMessage[]` | `-`     | Message list                       |
| `value?`        | `string`        | `-`     | Input value (controlled)           |
| `defaultValue?` | `string`        | `-`     | Default input value (uncontrolled) |

Events/callback props: `onChange?`, `onSend?`.
